title: Shiloh Baptist Office Home
body: Welcome to the Shiloh Baptist Office wiki. This space contains bylaws, committee minutes, maintenance records, vendor contacts, and event playbooks for church operations.

title: Church Bylaws
body: Official bylaws of Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi, Mississippi. Ratified by the congregation. Covers membership, governance, pastoral authority, deacon board, and financial oversight.

title: Building Committee Charter
body: Charter establishing the Building Committee, its scope of authority, membership composition, quorum requirements, and reporting obligations to the deacon board.

title: Committee Meeting Minutes — January 2024
body: Minutes from the Building Committee meeting held January 22, 2024. Attendees: Pastor Wilkins, Deacon Pittman, Gloria Tate, Lamar Boykin, Theresa Nguyen, Calvin Hargrove, John Baker. Topics: roof repair bids, HVAC filter schedule, parking lot lighting.

title: Committee Meeting Minutes — March 2024
body: Minutes from the Building Committee meeting held March 18, 2024. Topics: kitchen exhaust fan replacement, painting day scheduling, vendor quote review for landscaping contract.

title: Committee Meeting Minutes — May 2024
body: Minutes from the Building Committee meeting held May 20, 2024. Topics: insurance renewal timeline, safety inspection findings, fellowship hall flooring estimate.

title: Committee Meeting Minutes — September 2024
body: Minutes from the Building Committee meeting held September 16, 2024. Topics: annual budget overview presentation, visitor welcome guide updates, trustee report review.

title: Committee Meeting Minutes — January 2025
body: Minutes from the Building Committee meeting held January 27, 2025. Topics: 2025 budget approval, roof warranty review, parking lot resurfacing bids, kitchen equipment inventory update.

title: Committee Meeting Minutes — April 2025
body: Minutes from the Building Committee meeting held April 14, 2025. Topics: spring landscaping plan approval, painting day logistics, event setup checklist revisions.

title: Building Maintenance Log
body: Running log of building maintenance tasks, inspections, repairs, and contractor visits. Updated after each service call. Entries list date, area, description, technician, and status.

title: Vendor Contact List
body: Directory of approved vendors: Gulf Coast Roofing (228-555-0101), Biloxi HVAC Services (228-555-0202), Coastal Landscaping (228-555-0303), Gulf Janitorial Supply (228-555-0404), Harrison County Electric (228-555-0505), Magnolia Painting Co. (228-555-0606).

title: Painting Day Playbook
body: Step-by-step logistics for the annual church painting day. Covers volunteer sign-up, paint supply ordering from Magnolia Painting Co., surface preparation, safety rules, lunch coordination, and post-event cleanup checklist.

title: Landscaping Plan 2025
body: Approved landscaping plan for the 2025 calendar year. Includes seasonal mowing schedule, mulch replacement in front beds (April), shrub trimming (June, October), and irrigation system check (March). Contractor: Coastal Landscaping.

title: Kitchen Equipment Inventory
body: Inventory of fellowship hall kitchen equipment: 2 commercial ranges, 1 double-door refrigerator (purchased 2019), 1 chest freezer, industrial dishwasher (under warranty through 2026), 3 serving carts, commercial exhaust hood (serviced March 2024).

title: Annual Budget Overview 2025
body: 2025 operating budget for building and grounds. Total approved: $47,500. Breakdown: utilities $14,000, maintenance contracts $12,000, landscaping $4,500, painting and repairs $6,000, kitchen equipment $3,500, insurance $5,200, miscellaneous $2,300.

title: Event Setup Checklist
body: Standard checklist for setting up the fellowship hall for events. Covers table and chair arrangement, AV equipment check, kitchen prep, signage placement, parking cones, greeter station, and post-event teardown steps.

title: Safety Inspection Checklist
body: Annual safety inspection checklist mandated by church insurance policy. Covers fire extinguisher dates, exit sign lighting, electrical panel access, roof drainage, kitchen hood suppression system, nursery outlet covers, and parking lot lighting.

title: Visitor Welcome Guide
body: Guide for greeting and orienting first-time visitors. Covers parking directions, sanctuary entrance, welcome packet contents, nursery check-in process, visitor card collection, and follow-up contact procedure.

title: Trustee Report — Q4 2024
body: Quarterly report from the Board of Trustees covering property condition summary, outstanding maintenance items, insurance claims status, and recommendations for the 2025 budget cycle.

title: Insurance and Property Records
body: Repository of current insurance certificates, property deed summary, and policy renewal dates. Primary carrier: Mississippi Church Mutual. Policy renewal: July 1 each year. Contents coverage, liability, and directors and officers coverage all current.

title: Committee Meeting Minutes — February 2026
body: Minutes from the Building Committee meeting held February 23, 2026. Topics: spring painting day scheduling, landscaping vendor contract renewal, kitchen dishwasher warranty expiration planning, visitor welcome guide refresh.

title: Shiloh Baptist Office Archives Home
body: Archived historical documents for Shiloh Baptist Church, Biloxi. Contains legacy meeting minutes, prior-year budgets, and decommissioned policy documents.

title: Legacy Bylaws — Pre-2020 Revision
body: Archived copy of the church bylaws prior to the 2020 revision. Retained for historical reference only. Superseded by the current bylaws posted in the SBO space.
